pipeline.reviewNotes: Approved; no blockers remain after cycle-diff convergence gate
pipeline.testNotes: Quality gates passed: install (bun install --frozen-lockfile), typecheck (tsc --noEmit + hooks), frontend-typecheck (npx tsc --noEmit in src/dashboard/frontend), lint (eslint + effect/permissions/skills checks), build (npm run build + dashboard build). Unit tests passed: 543 test files, 5674 tests on core; 3 test files, 30 tests on frontend. No UAT required — test-only hermetic fix (changed provider assertion from toBe('openai') to typeof check to decouple from live config state).
pipeline.verificationNotes: Cleared by `pan specialists done review --status passed` override (PAN-1215)
